title: Supporting the designation of "Scouting America Day" in celebration of its 115th anniversary.
stage_label: Referred to the House Committee on Oversight and Government Reform.
subjects: Social work, volunteer service, charitable organizations
crs_summary: This resolution supports the redesignation of a Scouting America Day in celebration of the 115th anniversary of the incorporation of Scouting America (formerly known as Boy Scouts of America).
last_action_text: Sponsor introductory remarks on measure. (CR H589)
